type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment:
1) Hydrochloric acid (CAS 7647-01-0) was not reported in previous years. During the 2024 reporting cycle, it was identified through updated calculations and process review that the facility meets the reporting criteria. This entry has been included accordingly to ensure completeness and compliance.

2) Hydrochloric acid is neutralized on-site in the wastewater treatment plant. No unreacted hydrochloric acid is present in the off-site sludge.

3) In previous submissions, the consumption volume was divided by the chemical’s specific gravity or density, resulting in an underestimation of the actual mass used. For the current
reporting period, the volume has been applied directly, in alignment with NPRI guidance, to ensure a more accurate representation of usage. This adjustment reflects an internal correction to improve consistency and reporting accuracy.
Hydrochloric acid is neutralized on-site in the wastewater treatment plant.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Sulfuric acid is neutralized on-site in the wastewater treatment plant. No unreacted sulfuric acid is present in the off-site sludge.
Sulfuric acid is neutralized on-site in the wastewater treatment plant. No unreacted sulfuric acid is present in the off-site sludge.
Nitric acid is neutralized on-site in the wastewater treatment plant, generating nitrate ions. Nitrate ions are reported separately in this report.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment:
